title: tests: add basic zstd:chunked system test
body:

comments.body:
@edsantiago thanks for the review.

I changed the original tests, the test is just a starting point
@edsantiago I've added a new test to make sure the image content doesn't change after a push/pull

Tests LGTM. @Luap99 heads-up this will probably conflict with #24447 
Thanks @giuseppe

[int remote rawhide root](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5483556393189376) has timed out three times. I'm not liking this.

/hold

> [int remote rawhide root](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5483556393189376) has timed out three times. I'm not liking this.


also got a timeout in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24447 but didn't think to much of it as I did not try to rerun it yet as I knew it was broken anyway
https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6327338403627008

Thank you! That's good news. In the other log, it looks like all `healthcheck` commands time out. But since the entire test run times out, there's no (sane) way to see what other tests time out. In your log, I see a wide variety of tests timing out. And the cumulative effect of many random tests hanging for 90s is a test failure.

Something is definitely broken with remote root. ~~(remote rootless is passing just fine)~~(EDIT: int tests do not run remote rootless. My mistake). So far, no way to reproduce locally.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *giuseppe*, *Luap99* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,edsantiago,giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
